CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Continued To Oct-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2025 Continued To Apr-22-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT LASERAWAY, LLC's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Laseraway, LLC's motion to compel arbitration and stay is GRANTED. (See word minutes for complete ruling.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
